input.command:
python -c "
import pandas as pd
df1 = pd.read_excel('outputs/failed_students_output.xlsx')
df2 = pd.read_excel('uploads-answers/file-management/EVAL_FM_009/failed_students_output.xlsx')

# Check RollNo match
roll_match = set(df1['RollNo'].tolist()) == set(df2['RollNo'].tolist())
print('RollNo sets match:', roll_match)

# Check Status values
print('Agent Status unique:', df1['Status'].unique())
print('Expected Status unique:', df2['Status'].unique())

# Check name differences
df1_sorted = df1.sort_values('RollNo').reset_index(drop=True)
df2_sorted = df2.sort_values('RollNo').reset_index(drop=True)

# Find names that differ
for i in range(len(df1_sorted)):
    n1 = str(df1_sorted.loc[i, 'Name']).strip()
    n2 = str(df2_sorted.loc[i, 'Name']).strip()
    if n1 != n2:
        print(f'Row {i} RollNo={df1_sorted.loc[i,\"RollNo\"]}: Agent=\"{n1}\" Expected=\"{n2}\"')
"
input.description: Detailed comparison of agent vs expected output
